rulings.Case Title: JIM BATTS JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS B/P AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 6, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT LESLIE CONTROLS, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO PROVE THAT HE WORKED ON ANY ORIGINAL LESLIE CONTROLS' EQUIPMENT. ALTHOUGH THERE IS EVIDENCE THAT LESLIE CONTROLS' SPECIFIED THE USE OF ASBESTOS CONTAINING GASKETS, THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT LESLIE CONTROLS' SUPPLIED SUCH GASKETS OR THAT PLAINTIFF WORKED ON ANY LESLIE CONTROLS' PRODUCT WHERE A REPLACEMENT GASKET WAS SUPPLIED BY LESLIE CONTROLS. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: JANE RONGERUDE VS. LANNIE JEW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jennifer Jew'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or In The Alternative To Require Claimant To Provide Undertaking And For Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 6, 2007, LINE 11. DEFENDANT JENNIFER JEW'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO REQUIRE CLAIMANT TO PROVIDE UNDERTAKING AND FOR ATTORNEY FEES: IF DEFENDANT SUBMITS A SATISFACTORY STIPULATION CONFIRMING PLAINTIFF'S TENANCY, THE MOTION TO EXPUNGE WILL BE GRANTED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: 1884 LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. LOUIS ROESCH COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 6, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT LOUIS ROESCH COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE ALLEGED ORAL REPRESENTATIONS BY DAVOS ARE SUBJECT TO THE PAROLE EVIDENCE RULE: C.C.P. SECTION 1856 (A). THE DECISION IN BANK OF AMERICA V PENDERGRASS (1935) 4 CAL 2d. 258, 263 IS CONTROLLING. THE ALLEGED PROMISE IS DIRECTLY AT VARIANCE WITH THE PARTIES' WRITTEN AGREEMENT AND THE FRAUD IS BARRED BY THE PAROLE EVIDENCE RULE. THE CO-OPERATION CLAUSE IS NOT SUSCEPTIBLE TO THE INTERPRETATION THAT DEFENDANT MUST CONTINUE TO EXTEND THE CLOSING DATE. NO BREACH OF CONTRACT HAS BEEN ALLEGED. THERE IS NO CLAIM FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE BECAUSE THERE IS NO BREACH OF CONTRACT. THE REFORMATION CLAIM IS DEPENDENT ON THE FRAUD CLAIM, WHICH FAILS. THE UNJUST ENRICHMENT AND COMMON COUNT CLAIMS FAIL BECAUSE THE PARTIES' CONTRACT IS ENFORCEABLE AND NOT VITIATED BY THE ALLEGED FRAUD: THE ENFORCEABLE CONTRACT BARS THE CLAIM FOR PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL. PLAINTIFF HAS NO BASIS FOR THE CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST CLAIM. =(302/PJM/MN-X)

rulings.Case Title: BRIGHT NOW! DENTAL, INC., A WASHINGTON VS. TERRY OLSON et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO STANISLAUS COUNTY*****

rulings.Case Title: BRIGHT NOW! DENTAL, INC., A WASHINGTON VS. TERRY OLSON et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO STANISLAUS COUNTY*****

rulings.Case Title: LUXIM CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. JONES DAY, AN OHIO PARTNERSHIP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion For Preliminary Injunction Against Jones Day
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 6, 2007, LINE 12. PLAINTIFF LUXIM CORPORATION'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction Against Jones Day: HEARING REQUIRED. ALTHOUGH THIS IS A MOTION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND NOT DISQUALIFICATION, THE COURT CONTINUES TO BELIEVE THAT DECISION IN IN RE COMPLEX LITIGATION (1991) 232 CAL. APP 3D. 572, 600-601, PROVIDES WISE GUIDANCE FOR THE EXERCISE OF DISCRETION UNDER C.C.P. 1061. BY EXERCISING COMITY, THE COURT IS NOT FORCLOSING PLAINTIFF FROM ASSERTING ITS RIGHTS IN THE TWO FORUMS WHERE THOSE RIGHTS ALLEGEDLY ARE BEING INFRINGED. MOREOVER, IT MAY WELL BE UPON FURTHER ANLAYSIS THAT FEDERAL LAW PREEMPTS THIS COURT FROM GRANTING PLAINTIFF THE ESSENTIAL RELIEF IT SEEKS, I.E. PRECLUDING DEFENDANT'S PARTICIPATION IN THE P T O CASE. =(302/PJM/PB)
